name: loan_underwriting
description: a loan underwriting world with application states and risk; actions submit, verify, approve, decline

card.description: a loan underwriting world with application states and risk; actions submit, verify, approve, decline

rules: An application moves through states draft -> submitted -> verified, then terminates at approved or declined.
'submit' is only valid from 'draft' and may carry amount/income/credit_score in its params.
'verify' is only valid from 'submitted'; it sets verified=true and computes risk_score from debt-to-income and credit quality (0=safe, 100=risky).
'approve' is only valid from 'verified' and only when risk_score <= 50; it sets status=approved.
'decline' is valid from 'submitted' or 'verified' and sets status=declined.
'approved' and 'declined' are terminal: no action changes them.

emit.report: Loan application is {status}: amount {amount}, risk score {risk_score}, decision {decision}.

objectives.name: sound_decisions
objectives.goal: approve low-risk applications and decline high-risk ones
